m5_severity_match.note: Matched rows with non-empty GT rationale_if_no vs confidence tiers.

m6_gsop_coverage.note: Mean Jaccard on matched rows; GT side empty if CSV has no gsop_codes.

missed_subcats: Excl 1 met: Current or anticipated need for hospitalization within 24 hours.
Excl 10 met: Current use of any prohibited concomitant medication(s).
Excl 11 met: Has received any other antiviral or COVID-19 mAbs for the treatment of COVID-19 within 30 days or 5 half-lives prior to screening or covalescent COVID-19 plasma within 12 months.
Excl 12 met: Received any dose of a COVID-19 vaccine within 4 months of randomization or expected to receive one through Day 34.
Excl 13 met: Previous administration of an investigational product (drug or vaccine) within 30 days or 5 half-lives (whichever is longer) preceding the first dose of study intervention.
Excl 14 met: Prior participation in this clinical trial orany other clinical trial of ibuzatrelvir.

Excl 15 met: Investigator site staff directly involved in study conduct and their family, site staff otherwise supervised by the investigator, and sponsor and sponsor delegate employees directly involved in study conduct and their family.
Excl 2 met: Receiving dialysis or have known severe renal impairment (eGFR consistently <30 mL/min/1.73 m^2 for adults or CrCl <30 mL/min for adolescents).

Excl 3 met: Active liver disease with AST or ALT >3 ULN, Total bilirubin ≥2 × ULN (for Gilbert’s syndrome, direct bilirubin >ULN is exclusionary) within the past 3 months, or liver function impairment with Class C per Child Pugh classification.
Excl 4 met: Suspected or confirmed concurrent active systemicinfection other than COVID-19 that may interfere with the evaluation of response to the study intervention.
Excl 5 met: Ongoing Long COVID or PASC diagnosis.
Excl 6 met: Severely immunocompromised (see Appendix 13).
Excl 7 met: Comorbidity requiring hospitalization and/or surgery within 7 days prior to study entry, or that is considered life threatening within 30 days prior to study entry.
Excl 8 met: History of hypersensitivity or other contraindication to any of the components of the study intervention.
Excl 9 met: Any medical or psychiatric condition including recent (within the past year) or active suicidal ideation/behavior that makes the participant inappropriate for the study.
Incl 1 not met: 12 to <18 years of age, weighing at least 40 kg, or ≥18 years of age of any weight or WOCBP agrees to use highly effective contraception.
Incl 2 not met: Presence of risk factors for progression to severe COVID-19 based on age.
Incl 3 not met: Positive RAT nasal or NP specimen within 1 day prior to randomization / symptoms onset within 5 days prior to randomization.
Incl 4 not met: Unable or unwilling to take nirmatrelvir/ritonavir treatment for reasons listed in Appendix 11.
hallucinated_subcats: Contraception not confirmed/used prior to Day 1 as required per protocol
Participant did not meet one or more inclusion criteria but was randomized to the study treatment
Participant met all eligibility criteria but source documentation is incomplete or missing
Participant met all eligibility criteria but was randomized prior to assessment of all eligibility criteria
Participant met one or more exclusion criteria but was randomized to the study treatment

missed_subcats: Dosing/Administration error
Dosing/Administration error: Additional dose administered
Dosing/Administration error: Two or more consecutive doses missed
Dosing/Administration error: three or more doses missed
Storage error
hallucinated_subcats: IP accountability not done
Medication Error: Administration of IP by wrong subject, or at the wrong time, or at wrong dose, or other use outside the protocol
Participant compliance is <80% at one or more visits
Participant compliance is >120% at one or more visits
Participant took IP which was not viable due to shipping/storage conditions

missed_subcats: Mandatory concomitant medication/vaccine not taken/administered or not used as specified per protocol
Took prohibited concomitant medication/vaccine
hallucinated_subcats: Participant received a prohibited COVID-19 vaccine during the restricted study period (through Day 34)
Participant took a prohibited medication that could potentially impact efficacy assessments (e.g., other COVID-19 antivirals, mAbs, or convalescent plasma)
Participant took a prohibited medication that could potentially impact the metabolism of the study drug (ibuzatrelvir)

matched_subcats: Abnormal lab result not followed up appropriately
Lab for pregnancy testing not done or done out of visit window
missed_subcats: NP swab for viral load not done
Safety lab not done (not drawn)
hallucinated_subcats: Pharmacokinetic (PK) sample for ibuzatrelvir not collected or collected outside the specified time window
Required safety laboratory assessments (e.g., hematology, blood chemistry) not performed
SARS-CoV-2 RNA level assessment (NP swab) not collected or collected out of window, potentially impacting virologic secondary endpoints
The participant or the participant's legal guardian did not provide consent for collection of PrepD1 samples, although the samples were drawn
Baseline (Day 1) visit performed outside the protocol-specified window (e.g., >5 days after COVID-19 symptom onset)
One or more treatment period visits (Day 5, Day 10, Day 14, or Day 21) were not performed
Visit performed but outside protocol window.
Week 24 visit was not performed
Participant completed study dosing log incomplete, or not completed, as specified per protocol
Participant did not use highly effective contraceptive method(s) per protocol during the study
Participant-completed study diary (e.g., COVID-19 symptoms, Long COVID symptoms, WPAI, EQ-5D-5L) incomplete, or not completed, as specified per protocol
Protocol-specified procedure or test (e.g., SARS-CoV-2 RNA NP swab, PK sample) not performed per protocol
Protocol-specified procedure or test (e.g., SARS-CoV-2 RNA NP swab, PK sample, COVID-19 Rapid antigen test) not done

missed_subcats: Randomization done out of sequence
Randomization under wrong strata
Randomized out of protocol defined window
hallucinated_subcats: Incorrect age stratification group assigned.
Participant incorrectly randomized at Day 1
Participant randomized after the 5th day of COVID-19 symptom onset
Participant randomized but did not receive study intervention
Participant randomized prior to confirming all eligibility criteria
Wrong stratification group assigned based on risk factors for progression to severe COVID-19

matched_subcats: SAE/EIU not reported to Sponsor within specified timeframe
hallucinated_subcats: Event information submission to adjudication committee was delayed or not reported
Delayed discontinuation of study intervention (ibuzatrelvir or placebo) after discontinuation criteria had been met by the participant
Participant discontinued study intervention (ibuzatrelvir or placebo) prematurely but did not remain in the study to be followed for safety and efficacy assessments through Week 24
Accidental unblinding of site staff or study staff or participant caregiver
Health Information required to be protected was not properly redacted or was shared in error.
Participant enrolled in an age group (12 to 49 years or 50 to 64 years) after the enrollment cap of 20% for that group was reached
Site did not permit study-related monitoring to occur and/or did not permit direct access to source data documents

matched_subcats: Subject did not sign consent at age of majority
Subject/LAR did not sign ICD & did not give verbal consent
missed_subcats: Subject/LAR did not sign the ICD but gave verbal consent
hallucinated_subcats: Participant or the participant's legal guardian did not sign the main ICD/assent prior to first study procedure
Revised ICD not signed at the first subject visits after the revised/approved ICD was available at site
Study procedures were performed prior to ICD signed

near_misses.generated_text: Participant received rescue medication for COVID-19 that was not specified as per protocol
near_misses.gt_text: Took permitted concomitant medication/vaccine, but not as specified per protocol

near_misses.generated_text: Abnormal procedure/test result not followed up per protocol
near_misses.gt_text: Abnormal procedure/test result not followed up per protocol eDiary compliance: COVID-19/PGI symptoms daily diary overall completion below 75% eDiary compliance: Long COVID-19 symptoms weekly diary overall completion below 75%

near_misses.generated_text: Contraception counseling or contraception check during study visits not done
near_misses.gt_text: Procedures for contraception counseling/contraception requirements not followed

near_misses.generated_text: AE/SAE was not recorded in Clinical Database
near_misses.gt_text: SAE/EIU not reported in clinical database

near_misses.generated_text: SAE reporting was delayed or not reported to IEC or IRB per local regulations
near_misses.gt_text: SAE/EIU not reported to IRB per local regulations

near_misses.generated_text: Participant was discontinued from study intervention or the study but did not meet protocol-specified discontinuation criteria
near_misses.gt_text: Subject was discontinued but did not meet discontinuation criteria

near_misses.generated_text: Participant met protocol-specified criteria for discontinuation of study intervention or withdrawal from the study but was not withdrawn
near_misses.gt_text: Participant developed withdrawal criteria during the study but was not withdrawn

near_misses.generated_text: Subject/LAR signed a superseded/outdated version of the ICD
near_misses.gt_text: Subject/LAR signed and dated ICD after screen/enroll date
